How It Works

Simple. Passive. Profitable.

Three steps from handshake to revenue — and you never have to think about it again.

01 🤝
We Shake Hands

Sign a one-page agreement. 30-day trial, 14-day exit clause. No commitment, no risk. We work around your layout completely.

02 ⚡
We Handle Everything

We install the machine, stock it with top-selling products, and service it remotely. Built-in ID scanning — your staff never has to card anyone.

03 💰
You Get Paid Monthly

Every sale the machine makes, you earn 10% automatically. We pay you monthly. Most busy bars see $200–$400 extra per month, passively.

Why The Plug

Become the place
that has it all

Your guests are already looking for these products. Right now they're stepping outside or leaving your venue to find them. Keep that revenue in-house.

  • ✓
    Zero staff involvement Machine handles sales, ID verification, and inventory — your team stays focused on guests.
  • ✓
    Age-verified automatically ID scanning is built in. More reliable than a bartender mid-rush. Reduces your liability.
  • ✓
    Fully insured & licensed We carry liability insurance and handle all compliance. You're covered.
  • ✓
    Restocked within 24 hours We monitor inventory remotely. If the machine is down, it's our problem — not yours.
